span.p: Does it guard a critical, high-value behavior?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Is anyone willing to own it?

span.p: Delete it: a test nobody will fix protects nothing
